FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 Amid Diminishing Iran Tension
tldr_points: Geopolitical risk off‑take reduces safe‑haven demand for JPY
Technical window shows upside to 160.00 with disciplined risk
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY eyes higher ground as MA20 support holds and Iran‑US tensions ease.
FX.comment: Technical bullish bias reinforced by de‑escalating Iran tension and strong USD carry.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Price above MA20 signals near-term bullish momentum
tldr_points: Price trades above the 20‑day moving average, indicating short‑term bullish bias.
News flow shows mixed but overall positive catalysts, especially strong Nasdaq performance and sector‑specific bets.
Technical setup favors a long entry near MA20 with defined risk‑reward parameters.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 trades above MA20 at 7580, supported by positive Nasdaq momentum and selective fund inflows, suggesting near‑term upside.
STOCKS.comment: S&P 500 trades above MA20 at 7580, supported by positive Nasdaq momentum and selective fund inflows, suggesting near‑term upside.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: AI Detects Resistance Below MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Mixed
tldr_points: BTC trades below the 20‑day moving average, signaling near‑term bearish bias.
Macro news shows mixed signals: US crypto seizures weigh on risk appetite, while Texas reserve committee and CFTC futures approval provide modest support.
Technical stance favors short entries around 73.5k with TP near 71k and SL above MA20 at 75k.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC slips below MA20 resistance amid mixed macro cues; downside bias favors short entry near 73.6k with tight stops now.
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 with bearish order flow and mixed fundamentals supports a short bias toward 71k.
